textByHash.bb18345af0787842e2153c756130f3b33ad645f3: I think you can be trusted. What do you know about...
textByHash.fde60b232ed1fb3eb71d13fc8c98f05f42a973ad: Would you like to learn more about them? I'm conducting a, uh, research project, to, uh, learn about their social habits in their natural environment.
textByHash.81d137fce02a2b7848f9060d2a49ec56f94c6c63: Well, I need to build a shelter to hide from view, and it's always useful to have an extra pair of eyes, you know, for, uh, observing...Penguins.
textByHash.3f2cc0e86fff7e463fa829a64b3292dc801e6262: So, are you up for it?
textByHash.4ff9b8ade771ef0758e0a6acd1b0c0e7979efa18: I, uh, was a zoo keeper here. But, I, uh, am on leave to go research penguins in their native habitat.
textByHash.2730ef042cb6424e578f29238fb6dfef3e1cd285: Right. I need you to gather materials for the bird hide, while I arrange for our transport.
textByHash.a5d32182b987e1f79fa1bbc9d8b49af376a934e2: You need to get 10 oak planks, 10 steel nails, a hammer, and a spade so that we can build a bird hide.
textByHash.4146fc481676f84e57607fbd0a842cd67810db72: Once you have those, meet me up by the entrance to Keldagrim, east of Rellekka. I'll be there with a boat to take us to our destination.
textByHash.3d6f59156f5064165057140ba6ff87064305da14: You have all the materials. Off to the iceberg!
textByHash.e4a398f34ee9a81b4703d2587c97a41486ef4898: Once you have the items, meet me up by the entrance to Keldagrim, east of Rellekka. I'll be there with a boat to take us to our destination.
textByHash.94fbadfc06784f44c34ace5af8d85dba0bc51b07: And you call yourself an adventurer! There is a road from Catherby going north. Take it until you reach the Sinclair Mansion.
textByHash.da6d576e541b4f4ebad5621a219e8bc86bad6998: Take a left at the Mansion, cross two bridges and follow the road until you reach Rellekka. Head east, around Rellekka to the coast near the entrance of Keldagrim.
textByHash.fefa026f3be4ddc583d011e63cca29de8cb07b18: Did I spell that out enough for you?
textByHash.3f5913594b2cc6e9a9ce16fc14eb022a909f6b24: Use the planks on the patch of snow on that ridge. Once you have that constructed, use the spade on the snow to cover the hide.
textByHash.0a727d09a99d018f64549d12f01a0615c92e68c9: Not bad... Now you need to cover the bird hide in snow with a spade.
textByHash.098768ebe826e6ca0eb6a927d292bd8894dd97cf: Yes. Let's get in and start observing. You should note down anything interesting the penguins do. I'll include it in my, uh, research.
textByHash.3c748316bfee5f4d985fc63e2cf598f7e216ba75: Look, here come two penguins now.
textByHash.46f0ae4c94abc91ff6ed3e510515b03158e48bea: Looks like the penguins are on patrol again.
textByHash.77cdcbd33ba3e360b472206addaa99e4b0170cbd: They are organised! ORGANISED I tell you!
textByHash.92faca66469ef4e5295a4b3a99415e03e1c1c41c: I knew it. I knew they were up to something! Did you see that? They were patrolling!
textByHash.fd7476d16e070016d56dccc15a98aa9fcaaf5cc0: It isn't! They saluted and recognised each other. They're organised!
textByHash.7bdd7b2cc18e545b1a02ef9152071a3fbed8d2be: I don't care what you think. I know they are doing something. No one ever believes me. But I'll prove them wrong. ALL OF THEM.
textByHash.c6d0c62d52af986c89cd2467065f3f1439dd4c41: No one ever believes me. Can I...hug you?
textByHash.cc2f50f622ee89d18820565ac94c00343bdae608: We need to get closer to the penguins. Infiltrate them. Learn what they are doing.
textByHash.17ae05ad91a455fc246f1fc257318dffcef3df5a: We can't discuss it here; there are too many spies. Let's leave the iceberg and then I'll tell you my plans.
textByHash.e553f61f591a718c5c3fb4d19d28c88d5ec09dcd: We must get away from here before we discuss our plans. We don't want to be overheard.
textByHash.6f9dceecaa5909c5e8bc47f9ce9a8a0b027994fa: I have altered some designs of clockwork toys to make a clockwork penguin suit. We will use this to infiltrate their ranks.
textByHash.4b69f8f2c8ddb0934bc82661ed464338954d3734: No! I'm going to use a spell to shrink you down so you can control it from the inside.
textByHash.50c982a5e8e06936b72b7248a6f69b9ff22c6f85: The penguins know my scent. They'd find me out and capture me and...torture me. No, it has to be you.
textByHash.cd7b627db51baad36cd4def8c7247ae90dbc7da0: Don't worry. The spell only works if I'm nearby since I have to be constantly casting it. If trouble starts I'll be close by to help.
textByHash.92081bb6cabd3cf93345a632e3148c6b3406d73a: Here's the book. It has my designs and a list of things you need to get. Use your Crafting table at your house to build it, just like regular clockwork toys.
textByHash.56ad74faa2f454498dad303d8fa87d0da8d65cf6: You have to make it, because since I got fired from the Zoo I've been homeless. Thanks for caring.
textByHash.db66fc541b2f6aeb180fcf8f3c8e85b03bbc1c80: Well...it's permanent leave, and I am doing research! When I used to work at the Zoo, I noticed the penguins doing odd things, like taking notes or timing things. I asked to have my work detail transferred to their cage and I was fired!
textByHash.be6ff88cc580eba917b56b8788d738355c9a5534: I'm sure the penguins are behind it. So I kept spying on them and I'll prove everyone wrong!
textByHash.cfd6d4e0f00738bff82da43b7f4d9c6c908ec8d2: Err, no. I've had a few run-ins since then. But I don't have time for war stories, we need to concentrate on our mission!
textByHash.f691aebab30814119fb9fc619af0bfb1bba1dd00: When you're done making the suit, we'll head back to the iceberg and try it out.
textByHash.efdb4b45f5b0f8448484f65371ac21fc0b9f7a06: You don't seem to have the suit with you.
textByHash.a8c6ca66fd4195e69a8c2e281b878303fe5bfccc: That's perfect. You are a very skilled crafter. Now we must return to the iceberg and test it.
textByHash.331a1236507d34c9b2ff8105fe14f79c4fa37bf3: You haven't lost it, you just need to look for it more closely.
textByHash.2d4e230c3f2f32e9d8549ae5caab6d632c35d531: Well, lucky for you I did make another copy. But be more careful!
textByHash.2548978bedfa1aa582d43e7d9a498df2bce82c7e: You need 1 piece of silk, 1 clockwork mechanism, and 1 wood plank.
textByHash.60eef984c727ba356711175a8d754fce49946860: The book will explain how to make the suit. But, since you seem to lazy to read it, I'll summarise.
textByHash.0ffd26f206ab2d698f99c73b82122beb41c6693a: Take the materials to your house and use the Crafting table to make clockwork toys. From there you can make the suit.
textByHash.7c28a1473a414eafdddb4e2a07502f364ce09198: Look what they did to the bird hide! It's completely destroyed! The savages. The penguins are on to us.
textByHash.a22efce160437dd7fda78bd679cf9a2cf47f25cc: Well of course you can't make out tracks. Penguins walk single file to hide their numbers! They're clever...so very clever.
textByHash.da7e431021c1d3e8d002cf4b5466f2e7f93f488b: Oh, they act like they aren't, but it's all a guise. They wanted to scare us off. We must be on to something.
textByHash.96a1cfa8a178964b2671812f2f253fc4d272263c: But, we were so close to finding out what exactly is going on. It's all ruined now. How will we ever infiltrate them if there are none around to infiltrate?
textByHash.62afc6a81b48b4f14c3274e98770150272bb3bde: OF COURSE! You are brilliant. I should have thought of that. It's where all of this started. Let's return to the Zoo.
textByHash.43e71dc8e140e48a905e32af236b61c7c24df465: I can teleport us back to the Zoo. It'll be faster.
textByHash.eb760683ac87f5abe53d5efed342bbe95d583122: Boat rides lower my stress level.
textByHash.eee9ea37e281a43caf6daea972bc75cd54c567ea: I'm too tired to teleport again. You'll have to get back to the Zoo on your own.
textByHash.d77fac9a2acbc66cf26947ec867d387a0f01e256: I can teleport us back to the Zoo, but you'll have to make your own way back, teleports tire me out.
textByHash.cccad827dcf5536f865ab53ec6d4add8ad6cc9e4: After I put you in the suit, use the little gate in the enclosure to get inside. The zoo keepers won't notice.
textByHash.81711a38f1f7757445309fd7fe4208f42a1e8eb3: Well, a while back I was out in the field observing penguins. I worked for the Ardougne Zoo then. I was just quietly observing them when suddenly there was an avalanche.
textByHash.f38b3057c9bef65245256eaf6a97b2646df4413a: I'm not done! I was trapped, but a passing old man stopped to help. He said he would shrink me so I could crawl out from under the weight of the snow.
textByHash.a11853786d077cf401f649592d29f3e79812cfee: Then he taught me the spell in case I would have need of it again.
textByHash.ca24b9dd9b9c86345fee4adaf98a982f408d84ed: You see, that incident made me start suspecting the penguins, and my further work with them at the Zoo just confirmed it. I'm sure they got me fired. I know too much.
textByHash.47dc78864289b7bc1661b7f06b13d3d7aa2856fc: Okay, but remember, if you move too far away from me the spell will break and you'll be normal sized again. Also, if you need to switch back, just ask me and I'll unshrink you.
textByHash.c934578178942b42177ecdf8be6471936911def2: You will need your hands free to operate the suit.
textByHash.73ac09d052c3287d24c488c159d2c8578cdb14b2: You can't wear a cape inside the suit, it might get caught.
textByHash.9015fd8233a43cf62686c86712186cf6baa47399: Don't talk to me while you're in the suit! It'll give away your cover. Here, I'll get you out of it.
textByHash.52c5c30b096b31af80eebafa8b55779999e69489: All right, keep calm. One growth spurt coming up.
textByHash.8b0605d72bed8336d892f82536058f36ea24a565: Lumbridge? There aren't any penguins in Lumbridge. Not that I've seen. Where is this 'outpost'?
textByHash.e1436274b0734456de1312554a41b145a1818b84: They're organised little devils. Don't underestimate them.
textByHash.5a573c252e80f0726d99f9c9af69e9772799c8c7: You go on ahead to Lumbridge. I'll meet you there and put you in the suit.
textByHash.4c9455324379e0822c079dd2d5d262190afbcdc4: I was chatting with a local farmer, and there is a rumour about a 'thing' that lives around here. Maybe it's the penguin and these simple people don't recognise them.
textByHash.d074c5e9d4072cd83b48ec0b671cc323eb5ec2f3: No, I keep trying to tell you, they aren't crazy, they are dangerous and organised.
textByHash.ced76acba0d2bc6da3c2da6c9978076eb826ddd7: Well, since the penguin at the Zoo is the only one talking to you, maybe you should ask him.
textByHash.b2ee12acea5e48794942fafb4a25b6a95e08b9b3: I can teleport us back to the Zoo, but you'll have to make your own way back. Teleports tire me out.
textByHash.5e8d54aa6ae36a36e7dd57899028cdd865ace7d3: Maybe there's something he wants, something you can trade for the phrase? Or maybe there's some kind of magic that would persuade him?
textByHash.9c13c5b877f73809b21167a767dd000e24465904: I once had to clean all the penguins feet, back when I had a job.
textByHash.5edf291a4074024be4df95159a46ec42676276da: I distracted them by giving them cod fish and then did the job. It was gross.
textByHash.f4fb8f0fca7957ada85c55ba4e86ef266bd07b30: Or perhaps there's some sort of magic that could persuade the penguin? An object of power or the like?
textByHash.6734916589e19387ff697df0aa3dc158f8331750: You aren't taking this seriously! They are dangerous!
textByHash.5ed607253830275950ac965e7bbf37bc1cb7366e: Oh, just go talk to the sheep.
textByHash.8279d884ef8bcbf90ab675dfb9f23f28cecb5ee5: But there is no King of Lumbridge.
textByHash.dea1e83d714dda428e0240a06abcfaaf8a26a8b2: Don't take this so lightly. You might put Fred in danger because you were having a laugh.
textByHash.6f89f7749c483dcab9e757d2dcfac018d3384690: What a good plan! I just hope the sheep aren't working for the other side.
textByHash.bd0f283832180a2c761f35080ed0a8b34467752b: Great. Let's go back to the iceberg, I'll put you in your suit and we'll really see what these penguins are up to.
textByHash.2dd8dad8a90740b101ed50499b96b0d1bdc63f01: Now you can try and enter the outpost. This is exciting.
textByHash.8f274af45bd52c65869d4b269b71d8eff363d0e2: But you don't think penguins are dangerous anyway. So there's no danger is there? Or are you coming around to my thinking that they are dangerous?
textByHash.79cd04d65101232b99543cd82ee90f4545c124ab: Oh, no. The ice magnifies this spell, so it will allow you to go greater distances.
textByHash.8b3bccdc9edef3a11bb1ecb1fdb41e97cfc0b9fe: ID? But...they all look alike. Well, the other penguins probably just assumed you had it, since you said you were an agent.
textByHash.f23ae2908db25ccd01b28bd7d4fa6fbe4488e53b: You know, I met a rather shifty looking penguin once, north of Miscellania. He was named after some sort of pasta...
textByHash.d09cf265787c71b49dec55aa21f0d251f9209d57: Anyway, he worked for a black market. Maybe he has a contact here who could get you an ID?
textByHash.5f064861196d9f3fe6ca8cf100fbed77667fd641: Of course. Just look around here for a shifty pasta penguin.
textByHash.ec1dd56904ad6c6c2cef4c4b1d3eb41d4c08e9d5: That's what I've been saying from the start! But an entire army? This is just an outpost, so it can't be an entire army.
textByHash.12971f4f1c6746ddada1a09945665960462f7917: Still, it must only be an invasion party. The main force is on...well, it doesn't matter right now.
textByHash.b18096d2e3a588508a4bc014cee1360f2ef930ce: I've been doing some research of my own, and I think I know what our next step should be. There's a secret room, deep in the glacier. I think that is where they are making their war plans.
textByHash.7cb713c1ede2b433c318c8cb63b6ac6293d370cb: With us, you dolt! They are trying to take over the world. Have you not grasped this yet? You need to find that room. Our future depends on it.
textByHash.d5fd3dba0a44e8855f52ba1b5b27bc2d003c498a: It's probably the most well guarded room in the place. You'll need to find a way to get into it without arousing suspicion.
textByHash.afc668971b8659a5cd03d4afe76dbda033384e53: What are you doing out here! You need to get in there and find the secret room.
textByHash.a01008975b5fd31d42fb8e91287f9b7fffdd544a: I'm not even going to ask why.
textByHash.fe4ce9f073072d74eca6df1b22b9735679ab118b: I think dairy cows have bells, you could steal one from it. Bongos... I suppose you could make them? Mahogany is good for bending, and then just use soft leather for the drum.
textByHash.6695b1771851a236ebb07a456b88eaa3c5ffc13e: You're safe! I was really worried for a while there. What happened?
textByHash.73281b278829ea41f2e8a6ba67569168dbf77a2a: Yes, yes, you're very brave. I mean what happened in the War Room?
textByHash.956650cfd8396312b03b20ed10a159992b6424b1: But what was IN the War Room?
textByHash.9f1a4a338c22e0deabdf792dd320bce316eb5d46: YES! I knew it! I said I'd prove them all wrong. They are organised and invading. OH YEAH, Larry was right. Who was right? Larry was!
textByHash.abf9077e1251288dde6dc0959f15f27380fb06f7: You are such a buzz kill.
textByHash.1f8e942ef4bdfe31dbd9d406091edf4daabb8dcb: No, they only know mine. That agility course really stank up the suit and seems to have covered your scent. You might want to consider bathing soon.
textByHash.c4bfe6450f09918d155de60e076c966862584372: As for our next move, I've got...friends...elsewhere who should hear of this information, but we have plenty of time. It's not as though they made a break through in their research or something.
textByHash.6d6b9fde1d77f450f6834a8eaee5f9685157a462: I can't speak right now. I have too much to do. I will contact you when the time is right.
textByHash.57abbf36b7f70e5352c405c557605126fa7c34bc: Well, yes, I'm sure you've transported your arm every time you've used my boat. Isn't it always attached to the rest of your body?
textByHash.c1a9a93a4304067970e72fa55e6a6cb2376fd480: Your arm is... a troll? It's really not. I can see both of them. Sorry, have you had your brain shrunk into a penguin suit too many times?
textByHash.93c62b14c17e7f3172dc2c4efd05fb7def703a2b: You take your arm out to places? And what the heck is THAT?
textByHash.2269e4b831b996e202ae2f57cf27ddaf841aa07b: Sorry, I distinctly heard you say you wanted to transport your arm in it. Have you had your brain shrunk into a penguin suit too many times? I don't lend my boat to mad people.
textByHash.644eeac49fe3d9894df4bef86e338c11e97c8bf9: Your arm's arm has a farm... Please make this stop!
textByHash.625f29325692a1fc30db69337eb7373874ba10e7: You want my boat? Yes, yes, take my boat and go a very long way from me! And take your arm with you!
textByHash.864f2b4bfce18b13a97c6b8c84176ebb7f25155a: Please excuse me, I'm rather busy.
textByHash.0cd445489004da7e2587641c2979ef5afd0fce06: I'd like two Wooden drawers built.
textByHash.e25d9b28a4c85333299749cba53ad95fa654c7ec: I'd like a Wooden table built.
textByHash.404ad93d5cc3c9c8a90032a9e62f7d29c90257cf: I'd like my hat stand fixed.
textByHash.f7a09e3556d76855aa7b43a0233465d12a7e9eb4: I'd like two Oak drawers built.
textByHash.eeb5b3270a87a982c52a7d711cf1db99daf6a986: I'd like a Oak table built.
textByHash.ab0627667ef495d25ce968aded699ba14348d524: I'd like two Teak drawers built.
textByHash.a6cd885411c7de8c3f7a2cb9024e8ec9664eb6db: I'd like a Teak table built.
textByHash.0597c7c1c5e4247f75a0cb8843f0f4fafdea0bf7: I'd like two Mahogany drawers built.
textByHash.d5edd5f430b8b3f505758333570bec8ccab050fc: I'd like a Mahogany table built.
textByHash.9aeac939195ac4bebb7a2b47b01f4c0b244528ef: Thank you so much! Would you like a cup of tea before you go?
textByHash.a9d74092658630e7756901d5db0d76474bdcd292: Hello there, are you interested in buying one of my special capes?
textByHash.08be493625725984b1adf6f8c157ca967e57a5cd: Ahh well they make it less likely that you'll accidently attack anyone wearing the same cape as you and easier to attack everyone else. They also make it easier to distinguish people who're wearing the same cape as you
textByHash.a40c1aca8cacc9931a665f874e1045d06509992d: from everyone else. They're very useful when out in the wilderness with friends or anyone else you don't want to harm.
textByHash.123cfbd0bc01ad253a4811850a9ca0691b590048: So would you like to buy one?
textByHash.d88d04778f44557705b74a696a15280397f4a439: I'm looking for an experienced adventurer and you're not it. Come back when you are more capable.
textByHash.9d21b35fc8dfada3b81e632eae1aa8ef6c71a15c: What? Did you come to tell me I'm crazy too?
textByHash.624232cfc2e11be0b6d2b9dd76002700b62d958e: Oh, I don't have time for your lies. Go away
textByHash.880b3993bc40ce7301b4086f5f6078716196f514: Sorry, you can't use this boat.
textByHash.4563af09b483397f2319fec3bb26deba6d645da8: On the way I'll tell you the 42 ways penguins can torture you using a feather...
textByHash.a947fc4c09a23fc338899af235ab79228e46cc14: Never speak to me about that again.
